title: ozoroa benguellensis
intro: Ozoroa benguellensis, also known as Benguella tree, is a plant species native to Angola, which belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its bark, leaves, and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ozoroa benguellensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties, which can help in managing fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions by boiling the bark, leaves, and roots to extract its medicinal properties.
